hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(f.toLowerCase().includes('changelog')){process.stdout.write('{}');}else{process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'[WAJIB] Cek apakah perlu update apps/backoffice/CHANGELOG.md untuk perubahan ini. Format: [MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH] - YYYY-MM-DD'}}));}}catch(e){process.stdout.write('{}');}});"
